summary: Tested all new appearance settings (dark mode, font scale, bg intensity, sidebar compact, date format) and business configuration (company fields, timezone, advance%, business hours, backup retention, auto-cleanup). Found and fixed a critical bug where saving business config failed with 422 error due to empty string sent for auto_cleanup_months field.

minor.issue: Returns empty {} when no settings document exists in MongoDB (no defaults). After first PUT, returns all fields correctly.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: auto_cleanup_months sent as empty string '' instead of null when 'Desactivado' selected, causing 422 from Pydantic. Fixed in handleSaveNotif by converting '' to null before sending.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/settings returns {} when no document in DB - consider returning default values instead of empty object for better UX on first run
date-fmt testid for YYYY-MM-DD is 'date-fmt-YYYY-MM-DD' (hyphens preserved) while DD/MM/YYYY becomes 'date-fmt-DDMMYYYY' (slashes removed) - inconsistent testid pattern

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 - 1 test was ordering dependent, API works correctly)

features_verified.dark_mode_toggle: PASS - activates data-dark=true, persists to localStorage, toast shown, persists on /dashboard
features_verified.font_scale_chips: PASS - compact/normal/large chips work, change data-fs attribute, persist to localStorage
features_verified.bg_intensity_chips: PASS - off/subtle/normal/vivid chips all work and persist
features_verified.sidebar_compact_toggle: PASS - reduces sidebar to 72px (icons only), persists, navigates correctly
features_verified.date_format_chips: PASS - DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD all work (correct testid: date-fmt-YYYY-MM-DD)
features_verified.business_config_fields: PASS - empresa, telefono, direccion, sitio web, NIT fields all present and fillable
features_verified.timezone_select: PASS - dropdown with latinoamerican timezones (testid: biz-timezone)
features_verified.business_hours: PASS - two time inputs with 12h display
features_verified.save_business_config: PASS (after fix) - PUT /api/settings saves all fields to MongoDB

context_for_next_testing_agent: All appearance settings and business config are working. Bug fixed: auto_cleanup_months empty string was causing 422. Dark mode persists on navigation. Sidebar compact works (72px). All testids confirmed: dark-mode-toggle, font-compact/normal/large, bg-off/subtle/normal/vivid, sidebar-compact-toggle, date-fmt-DDMMYYYY/MMDDYYYY/YYYY-MM-DD, biz-company-name, biz-advance-pct, biz-timezone, biz-backup-retention, biz-auto-cleanup, biz-save-btn.
